ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sailor */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the sailor */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club affiliation of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth for age verification */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for demographic analysis */,
  "sailing_history" TEXT /* Detailed history of sailing experience */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements and awards */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating or rank of the sailor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailors_club FOREIGN KEY ("club") REFERENCES clubs ("club_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for club communication */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Current number of club members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the sailboat (e.g., Laser, Laser Radial) */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet of the sailboat (e.g., Medium/Slow, Fast) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer or make of the sailboat */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sailboat */,
  "year_made" INTEGER /* Year the sailboat was manufactured */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner (sailor) of the sailboat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., regatta, race, championship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the sailor */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the sailor based on PY */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the sailor */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the sailor in the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalties incurred by the sailor during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_yardsticks" (
  "py_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PY */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat */,
  "py_number" INTEGER /* PY number of the sailboat */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the PY number becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the PY number expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the PY number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("py_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_yardsticks_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sailor, spectator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor participating in the event */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailboat used in the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sailor registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participation (e.g., confirmed, pending, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)
